description_long: This object is a stylized flower with six broad, rounded red petals radiating symmetrically around a large, flat yellow central disk. The petals are evenly spaced and slightly overlap at their bases, creating a classic daisy-like appearance. The central disk is prominent and slightly domed, providing a strong visual contrast to the petals. A single, slender green stem extends from beneath the central disk, curving gently outward. No leaves are visible on or near the stem, emphasizing the simplicity of the design. The overall form is smooth and cartoon-like, with a glossy finish that suggests a synthetic or plastic material.
description: A stylized flower with six red petals and a large yellow center, attached to a single green stem. The design is smooth, glossy, and cartoon-like.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six red petals radiating around the yellow center, with the green stem visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the green stem and the overlapping bases of the petals.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the six petals around the yellow disk, with minimal stem visible.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view showing the back side of the petals and the yellow center, with the stem partially obscured.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, evenly spaced around the central disk with slight overlapping at the base, exhibiting strong radial symmetry typical of many daisy-like flowers.
